title: Craftplay Chunky Glitter | 6mm Hexagon Green | 200g Tub with Shaker Lid
availability_text: Only 1 left in stock (more on the way).
features: CHUNKY GLITTER | Chunky glitter in plastic container with easy pouring top, and fastening lid for storage.
SIZE | 200 grams of chunky glitter. Glitter flakes are 6mm hexagon shaped.
CRAFTS | Ideal for a wide range of creative art and craft projects.
WIDE RANGE OF COLOURS | Choose from 6 colours or our bumper pack of all 6 coloured tubs.
NURSERIES & PLAY GROUPS | The chunky glitter is ideal for arts and crafts projects, collages or for decorations. The chunky glitter is suitable for craft groups, schools, nurseries, & play groups.
